name: GH_ComponentAttributes
summary: These Attributes are the default for GH_Components.

constructors.name: GH_ComponentAttributes
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the GH_ComponentAttributes class

methods.name: AppendToAttributeTree
methods.signature: public override void AppendToAttributeTree(List<IGH_Attributes> attributes)
methods.summary: (Overrides GH_Attributes<T>.AppendToAttributeTree(List<IGH_Attributes>).)

methods.name: ExpireLayout
methods.signature: public override void ExpireLayout()
methods.summary: (Overrides GH_Attributes<T>.ExpireLayout().)

methods.name: InvalidateCanvas
methods.signature: public override bool InvalidateCanvas(GH_Canvas canvas, GH_CanvasMouseEvent e)
methods.summary: The canvas must be invalidated when the mouse is near enough and this component has variable parameters.

methods.name: IsMenuRegion
methods.signature: public virtual bool IsMenuRegion(PointF point)
methods.summary: Determines whether a point is available for context menu popups. By default, IsMenuRegion calls IsPickRegion(PointF).

methods.name: IsPickRegion(PointF)
methods.signature: public override bool IsPickRegion(PointF point)
methods.summary: (Overrides GH_Attributes<T>.IsPickRegion(PointF).)

methods.name: IsPickRegion(RectangleF, GH_PickBox)
methods.signature: public virtual bool IsPickRegion(RectangleF box, GH_PickBox method)
methods.summary: Determines whether a rectangle is a valid pick region for this object. By default, the picking rectangle is intersected with the Bounds rectangle.

methods.name: IsTooltipRegion
methods.signature: public virtual bool IsTooltipRegion(PointF point)
methods.summary: Determines whether a point is available for tooltip popups. By default, IsMenuRegion calls IsTooltipRegion(PointF).

methods.name: Layout
methods.signature: protected override void Layout()
methods.summary: (Overrides GH_Attributes<T>.Layout().)

methods.name: LayoutBounds
methods.signature: public static RectangleF LayoutBounds(IGH_Component owner, RectangleF bounds)

methods.name: LayoutComponentBox
methods.signature: public static RectangleF LayoutComponentBox(IGH_Component owner)
methods.summary: Utility layout method for GH_Component style UI.

returns.doc: The rectangle describing the box of the component name/icon.

methods.name: LayoutInputParams
methods.signature: public static void LayoutInputParams(IGH_Component owner, RectangleF componentBox)

methods.name: LayoutOutputParams
methods.signature: public static void LayoutOutputParams(IGH_Component owner, RectangleF componentBox)

methods.name: NewInstanceGuid()
methods.signature: public void NewInstanceGuid()
methods.summary: Generate a new instance GUID for the owner object.

methods.name: NewInstanceGuid(Guid)
methods.signature: public void NewInstanceGuid(Guid newId)
methods.summary: Generate a new instance GUID for the owner object. Do not use this overload unless you're > 1.95m and called David.

methods.name: PerformLayout
methods.signature: public void PerformLayout()
methods.summary: Recompute the layout for these attributes. This function is automatically called during Drawing operations, so you typically don't have to.

methods.name: PrepareForRender
methods.signature: protected virtual void PrepareForRender(GH_Canvas canvas)
methods.summary: This method will always be called exactly once prior to Render(). This would be a good place to make sure all the necessary GUI data is up and running.

params.name: canvas
params.doc: Canvas that is about to render these attributes.

methods.name: Read
methods.signature: public virtual bool Read(GH_IReader reader)
methods.summary: (Inherited from GH_Attributes<T>.)

methods.name: Render
methods.signature: protected override void Render(GH_Canvas canvas, Graphics graphics, GH_CanvasChannel channel)
methods.summary: (Overrides GH_Attributes<T>.Render(GH_Canvas, Graphics, GH_CanvasChannel).)

methods.name: RenderComponentCapsule(GH_Canvas, Graphics)
methods.signature: protected void RenderComponentCapsule(GH_Canvas canvas, Graphics graphics)
methods.summary: Utility function, draws the complete component capsule including all parameter data.

methods.name: RenderComponentCapsule(GH_Canvas, Graphics, Boolean, Boolean, Boolean, Boolean, Boolean, Boolean)
methods.signature: protected void RenderComponentCapsule(GH_Canvas canvas, Graphics graphics, bool drawComponentBaseBox, bool drawComponentNameBox, bool drawJaggedEdges, bool drawParameterGrips, bool drawParameterNames, bool drawZuiElements)
methods.summary: Utility function, draws the component capsule including all specified elements.

params.name: drawComponentBaseBox
params.doc: If true, will draw the component background box.

params.name: drawComponentNameBox
params.doc: If true, will draw component nickname/icon element.

params.name: drawJaggedEdges
params.doc: If true, parameterless sides will have jagged edges drawn on them.

params.name: drawParameterGrips
params.doc: If true, will draw parameter grips.

params.name: drawParameterNames
params.doc: If true, will draw parameter nicknames.

params.name: drawZuiElements
params.doc: If true, will draw ZUI variable parameter interface.

methods.name: RenderComponentParameters
methods.signature: public static void RenderComponentParameters(GH_Canvas canvas, Graphics graphics, IGH_Component owner, GH_PaletteStyle style)
methods.summary: Utility method for rendering all component parameters.

methods.name: RenderIncomingWires(GH_Painter, IEnumerable<IGH_Param>, GH_ParamWireDisplay)
methods.signature: protected void RenderIncomingWires(GH_Painter painter, IEnumerable<IGH_Param> sources, GH_ParamWireDisplay style)
methods.summary: Utility function for derived classes. This method draws all the wires going into the left side of the attributes.

params.name: painter
params.doc: The graphics object to paint with

params.name: sources
params.doc: A list of sources that will be connected with the input grip of this attribute

methods.name: RenderIncomingWires(GH_Painter, IEnumerable<IGH_Param>, IEnumerable<Pen>)
methods.signature: protected void RenderIncomingWires(GH_Painter painter, IEnumerable<IGH_Param> sources, IEnumerable<Pen> styles)
methods.summary: Utility function for derived classes. This method draws all the wires going into the left side of the attributes.

params.name: painter
params.doc: The graphics object to paint with

params.name: sources
params.doc: A list of sources that will be connected with the input grip of this attribute

params.name: styles
params.doc: A collection of pen objects to use for each source. If a pen is null, the default wire style will be used instead.

methods.name: RenderToCanvas
methods.signature: public void RenderToCanvas(GH_Canvas canvas, GH_CanvasChannel channel)
methods.summary: Render these attributes into a Canvas control. This function places calls to PrepareForRender() and Render(), you should override those.

methods.name: RenderVariableParameterUI
methods.signature: protected void RenderVariableParameterUI(GH_Canvas canvas, Graphics graphics)

methods.signature: public override void SetupTooltip(PointF canvasPoint, GH_TooltipDisplayEventArgs e)
methods.summary: (Overrides GH_Attributes<T>.SetupTooltip(PointF, GH_TooltipDisplayEventArgs).)

methods.signature: public virtual bool Write(GH_IWriter writer)
methods.summary: (Inherited from GH_Attributes<T>.)

properties.name: AllowMessageBalloon
properties.summary: Gets a value indicating whether these attributes allow warning and error balloons to be drawn on top of them.

properties.name: Bounds
properties.summary: Gets the rectangle that contains the active content of the attributes. Typically the Contents determine the active area for menus, tooltips etc. Attributes are not supposed to draw objects beyond the Bounds.

properties.name: ContentBox
properties.summary: Gets the bounds of the component area of the attributes.

properties.name: DocObject
properties.summary: Gets the owner object of these attributes.

properties.name: GetTopLevel
properties.summary: Gets the top-level attributes of the attribute stack these attributes belong to.

properties.name: InputGrip
properties.summary: Gets the input grip location for these attributes. If HasInputGrip equals False, this point is meaningless.

properties.name: InstanceGuid
properties.summary: Gets the instance ID of the document object that owns these attributes.

properties.name: IsTopLevel
properties.summary: Gets whether these attributes are top_level (i.e. no Parent attributes)

properties.name: OutputGrip
properties.summary: Gets the output grip location for these attributes. If HasOutputGrip equals False, this point is meaningless.

properties.name: Owner
properties.summary: Gets the type-safe owner object of these attributes. This property is identical to the DocObject property.

properties.name: Parent
properties.summary: Gets or sets the parent attributes. Top level attributes do not have parents.

properties.name: Pivot
properties.summary: Gets or sets the pivot for these attributes. The pivot controls the general placement of the attributes. If you want to move the attributes, change the pivot location.

properties.name: Selected
properties.summary: Gets or sets the selected state of the top-level attributes.

properties.name: TooltipEnabled
properties.summary: Gets the tooltip enabled value. If False, no further tooltip functions will be called.

properties.name: m_innerBounds
properties.summary: Represents the Rectangle that contains the component black box.
